single_runner_caveat: Single rater (Claude). Public API + commit history evidence only — no test execution, no internal-implementation reading, no multi-rater consensus. See triage-rubric.md for full caveats.

decisions.summary: _value(forBucketContents:) (UInt64) -> Int? × _bucketContents(for:) (Int?) -> UInt64 — codec by name + asymmetric (T) -> U / (U) -> T type-shape; cycle-14 #1 rate-stability accept
bucket(after:) × bucket(before:) — direction-pair on Bucket; both forward index ops, not inverses; cycle-9 V1.12.1 direction-counter applied (-15) but pair surfaces post v1.18.A carrier signal
index(after:) × index(before:) — direction-pair on Int across the OD namespace; not inverses (both are next/prev index ops on the same dictionary); same shape as #2
index(after:) × _minimumCapacity(forScale:) — cross-file confused pair; unrelated functions on different domains; cross-product noise
exp(_:) × log(_:) — genuine canonical inverse pair on principal branch; cycle-14 #5 rate-stability accept
cosh(_:) × acosh(_:) — genuine principal-branch inverse pair; cycle-14 #9 rate-stability accept
sinh(_:) × asinh(_:) — genuine principal-branch inverse pair; cycle-14 #10
tanh(_:) × atanh(_:) — genuine principal-branch inverse pair; cycle-14 #11
cos(_:) × acos(_:) — genuine principal-branch inverse pair; cycle-14 #12
sin(_:) × asin(_:) — genuine principal-branch inverse pair; cycle-14 #13
tan(_:) × atan(_:) — genuine principal-branch inverse pair; cycle-14 #14
exp(_:) × cosh(_:) — cross-product; cosh(z) = (exp(z) + exp(-z))/2 forward, not inverse; cycle-14 #3 reject
exp(_:) × sqrt(_:) — forward-forward cross-product; cycle-14 #6 reject
log(_:) × sqrt(_:) — forward-forward cross-product; cycle-14 #16 reject
endOfChunk(startingAt:) × startOfChunk(endingAt:) — genuine inverse on chunk-boundary domain; cycle-14 #19 rate-stability accept
_description(type:) (String) -> String — formatter wraps input in structural format; applying twice prepends wrapper twice; cycle-14 #21 reject
firstOccupiedBucketInChain(with:) (Bucket) -> Bucket — bucket-chain seek; whether re-applying to the result is invariant is internal-state dependent; cycle-14 #22 unknown rate-stability
exp(_:) — exp(exp(z)) ≠ exp(z); cycle-14 #23 reject
log(_:) — log(log(z)) ≠ log(z); cycle-14 #24 reject
sqrt(_:) — sqrt(sqrt(z)) = z^(1/4); idempotent only at fixed points 0 and 1; cycle-14 #28 reject
nearMissLines(_:) ([String]?) -> [String]? — formatter; cycle-14 #32 unknown rate-stability check
index(_:offsetBy:) — directional first-arg vs second-arg; cycle-14 #33 reject
-(z:w:) (Complex, Complex) -> Complex — subtraction, anti-commutative; cycle-14 #36 reject
_relaxedAdd(_:_:) (Self, Self) -> Self — relaxed-precision addition; commutative modulo FP rounding; cycle-14 #37 accept
index(_:offsetBy:) (Int, Int) -> Int — Int offset addition is associative; cycle-14 #38 accept; cross-template (commutativity-no / associativity-yes) verdict consistency
/(z:w:) (Complex, Complex) -> Complex — division, non-associative; cycle-14 #41 reject
_relaxedMul(_:_:) (Self, Self) -> Self — relaxed-precision multiplication, associative modulo FP rounding; cycle-14 #42 accept

_minimumCapacity(forScale:) (Int) -> Int — capacity-from-scale, monotonic in scale (larger scale → at-least-as-large minimum capacity); cycle-14 #43 accept on the same name in _HashTable+Constants.swift
index(after:) (Int) -> Int — strictly monotonic Int+1 increment
sizeOfChunk(offset:) (Int) -> Int — query-based size lookup; size depends on chunk boundary, not linearly on offset; cycle-14 #46 reject
walkCap(for:) (C) -> Int — collection-bounded count, monotonic in collection size; cycle-14 #47 accept
endOfChunk(startingAt:) × startOfChunk(endingAt:) — same site as round-trip #15; functional inverse on chunk-boundary domain; cycle-14 #49 accept
bucket(after:) × bucket(before:) — direction-pair on Bucket; cycle-9 V1.11.1 direction-counter applied (-10); both forward index ops, not inverses; same shape as round-trip #2 reject
rescaledDivide(_:_:) (Complex, Complex) -> Complex × Complex.zero — division by zero is undefined, not identity; cycle-6 #50 + cycle-14 #50 rate-stability reject

OrderedSet.formUnion(__owned Self) ↔ OrderedSet.union(__owned Self) -> Self — canonical SetAlgebra form-prefix dual; both compute set union; mutating version in-place, non-mutating returns Self; semantically equivalent by spec
OrderedSet.formIntersection(Self) ↔ OrderedSet.intersection(Self) -> Self — canonical SetAlgebra dual
OrderedSet.formSymmetricDifference(__owned Self) ↔ OrderedSet.symmetricDifference(__owned Self) -> Self — canonical SetAlgebra dual
OrderedSet.subtract(Self) ↔ OrderedSet.subtracting(Self) -> Self — SetAlgebra dual; subtract is the form-less variant in stdlib SetAlgebra protocol

OrderedDictionary.merge(_:uniquingKeysWith:) ↔ OrderedDictionary.merging(_:uniquingKeysWith:) -> Self — canonical Swift dict merging convention; both apply the uniquing-keys-with combiner over the same input sequence; semantically equivalent

lifted: AdjacentPairsSequence.Iterator.next() — Iterator.next() advances iterator state per call; calling twice returns the next-next element, not the same element; lifted (Iterator) -> Iterator is NOT idempotent
lifted: Combinations.Iterator.next() — same Iterator.next() shape; advances combinatorial state per call; not idempotent
lifted: ChunkedIterator.advance() — name variant of next(); same stateful-incremental class; lifted form is not idempotent
lifted: _HashTable.BucketIterator.advance() — bucket-chain Iterator-shape; advance() steps to next bucket per call; not idempotent
lifted: OrderedSet._isUnique() — internal copy-on-write uniqueness check; calling twice on already-unique storage is no-op; lifted form is idempotent (terminal mutator)
lifted: OrderedSet._regenerateHashTable() — rebuilds hash table from scratch; regenerating twice produces identical state; lifted form is idempotent (terminal mutator)

lifted: _HashTable.BucketIterator.advance(until: Int) -> Void — advance(until: Int) is monotone-bounded (advance until the iterator reaches the specified index); not additive; advance(until: a) then advance(until: b) is roughly max(a, b)-bounded, NOT advance(until: a + b); composition property fails
